FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY 89
MERCURY+DRAGON TAIL+MOON
are in the North signs. Intellect (Mercury) D. Tail (Wireless) and
Moon (Mind) indicating that the native has extraordinary intution
and an highly intellectual one. Saturn and Jupiter both air Retro
in Aries. They are aspecting the rear sign of Pisces where there
is Dragon Tail (Flag)-One the other side Saturn and Jupiter are
aspected by the Sun thus indicating that the native/will have
career under Central government agencies, besides being a
guide.
